title: Verify existing implementation of deep-merge utility
description: The deep-merge utility already exists and is fully implemented with 25 passing tests. src/utils/deep-merge.ts provides merge<T>(target: T, source: Partial<T>): T with recursive object merging. src/utils/deep-merge.test.ts has comprehensive test coverage including flat/nested objects, arrays, null/undefined handling, and edge cases.
existing_patterns: src/utils/deep-clone.ts - recursive utility with plain object guard (isPlainObject)
src/utils/omit.test.ts - vitest describe/it/expect test structure with comprehensive edge cases
